headline: War in Iran: Europe's complicit silence on international law
description: European reluctance to condemn the Israeli-American intervention in Iran flies in the face of the continent's values. No one can believe that Benjamin Netanyahu and Donald Trump's goal is to defend the interests of the Iranian people.

headline: Paris mayoral elections: What do the candidates propose?
description: Le Monde breaks down the platforms of the capital's six main candidates on safety, cleanliness, housing and the environment ahead of the French municipal elections on March 15 and 22.

headline: French court rejects Sarkozy's bid to merge sentences
description: Having served one of two separate sentences with electronic ankle tags, Nicolas Sarkozy attempted to have the second one considered served. Last year, he also went to prison in a third case, which he is appealing.

headline: 'Carbon pricing at Europe's borders is a good idea, but it has clear limits'
description: Economists Christian Gollier, Axel Ockenfels and Catherine Wolfram warn of the risk posed to Europeans by the lack of ambitious, reciprocal climate commitments from their economic partners.

headline: One week before France's local elections, electorate leans right, poll shows
description: With environmental issues taking a back seat, security issues coming to the fore and a clear increase in support for the far-right Rassemblement National, the survey conducted by Ipsos BVA for Le Monde, Cevipof and the Jean Jaurès Foundation paints an unprecedented picture of the French political landscape.

What the Greek myth of Pandora reveals about the deep-seated fear of women
description: By opening a jar entrusted to her by the gods, Pandora becomes the instrument of their vengeance against rebellious humans and unleashes a torrent of plagues upon her fellow mortals. This misogynistic myth seems to contain all the resentments one half of humanity harbors against the other.

headline: Thomas Piketty: 'In the face of Trump's militaristic drift and looming disaster, Europe must equip itself to have global influence'
description: Following the intervention in Venezuela, the war against Iran launched by the US president signals yet another admission of weakness by the United States, observes the economist in his column. This military agitation primarily serves to bolster the US economy.

headline: Iranian school hit by air strike: Le Monde's investigation confirms many civilian victims, including children
description: Videos obtained and analyzed by Le Monde confirmed that the bombing of a school in Minab, Iran, on the first day of joint US-Israeli strikes on the country, caused many civilian victims, including children.
byline: Alexandre Horn,  Asia Balluffier and  Ghazal Golshiri
